expense.greeting: Hello <1>{{clientName}}</1>! Please enter the business expenses related to your 1099-NEC income below.
expense.businessContext: You are entering expenses for business: {{businessName}}
expense.errorMessage: Please contact the tax office for support.
expense.contactCPA: Please contact your CPA for a new link.
expense.formLockedMessage: CPA has locked this form. Please contact the office if you need to make changes.
expense.autoCalculated: Automatically calculated from 1099-NEC forms received and verified by your CPA.
expense.no1099NecIncomeNote: Your CPA has not received or verified a 1099-NEC for this Schedule C yet.
expense.travelTooltip: Business travel costs: airfare, hotels, taxi (excluding meals).
expense.travelDescription: Airfare, hotels, taxi, Uber for business
expense.mealsTooltip: Meal expenses with clients or business partners (50% deductible).
expense.mealsDescription: Meals with clients or partners (50% deductible)
expense.suppliesTooltip: Consumable business supplies: tools, materials, office supplies.
expense.carMethodNote: IRS allows only one method (not both)
expense.businessMilesNote: Only business miles (deliveries, client visits...), not commute
expense.actualCarTooltip: Actual car expenses: gas, insurance, repairs, car wash (IF not using mileage rate).
expense.actualCarIncludes: Includes: gas, car insurance, repairs, car wash, parking, tolls
expense.otherExpensesDescription: For other expenses like: equipment, phone, internet, advertising, rent, insurance, etc.
expense.successMessage: Your expense information has been sent to CPA.
expense.cpaReview: CPA will review the information and contact you if additional details are needed.
expense.canEditAnytime: You can edit the information anytime before CPA locks the form.
expense.progress.label: {{filled}} of {{total}} items filled
expense.vehicleInfoNote: Additional information for IRS if claiming car expenses
expense.vehicleUsedForCommute: Was the vehicle used for commuting?
expense.vehicleAnotherAvailable: Do you have another vehicle for personal use?
expense.vehicleEvidenceWritten: Do you have written evidence of business miles?
expense.totalMilesTooltip: Total miles driven for business purposes during the year (deliveries, client visits, work).
expense.validation.cannotSubmit: Unable to submit form. Please try again.

rental.propertyCount: How many rental properties do you have?
rental.propertyCountDescription: Use the +/- buttons to set the number of properties you want to report
rental.propertyDetailsDescription: Enter the address and basic information for this property
rental.rentsReceivedDescription: Total rental income received during the tax year
rental.propertyExpensesDescription: Enter expenses related to this rental property
rental.insuranceTooltip: Insurance premiums for the rental property.
rental.mortgageInterestTooltip: Interest paid on mortgage loans for the rental property.
rental.repairsTooltip: Costs for repairs and maintenance of the property.
rental.taxesTooltip: Annual real estate taxes on the property.
rental.utilitiesTooltip: Electric, water, gas costs (if paid by landlord).
rental.managementFeesTooltip: Property management and rental agent fees.
rental.otherExpensesDescription: Add other expenses not listed above
rental.reviewDescription: Review your information before submitting to CPA
rental.successMessage: Your rental property information has been sent to CPA.
rental.cpaReview: CPA will review the information and contact you if additional details are needed.
rental.canEditAnytime: You can edit the information anytime before CPA locks the form.
rental.reducePropertyMessage: You previously submitted {{from}} properties. Changing to {{to}} will remove the data for the extra properties. If you only want to edit an existing property, keep {{from}} properties and tap Next.

rental.validation.cannotSubmit: Unable to submit form. Please try again.

portal.uploadedFiles.linkedTooltip: Contact your accountant to remove this
portal.disclaimer1: All official and legally binding communications (phone call and text) must be conducted exclusively through the designated phone number: 878-678-0999.
portal.disclaimer2: Ella.tax will not be held responsible or liable for any information, agreements, or actions resulting from communications made outside of the authorized number.

contractorIntake.subtitle: Enter contractor information for 1099-NEC filing
contractorIntake.done: You're all done! You can close this tab.
contractorIntake.invalidLinkMessage: This link is no longer valid. Please contact the tax office for a new link.
nda.greeting: Hi {{firstName}} — please review the agreement below.
nda.depositNote: A {{amount}} initial payment is also acknowledged in this document.
nda.signatureHint: Use your finger or mouse to sign in the box above.
nda.consent.tinLastFourHint: Enter last four only. Do not enter the full SSN or EIN.
nda.agreeLabel: I am authorized to sign and agree to all terms of this Agreement.
nda.scrollFirstHint: Please scroll to the end of the agreement before signing.
nda.confirmedMessage: Your NDA with {{orgName}} is complete. A copy has been saved to your file.
nda.downloadTtlHint: Download link is valid for 15 minutes. Contact your CPA if you need a fresh copy.
nda.contactHint: Please contact your CPA if you need help.

nda.error.invalid.message: This agreement link is invalid or no longer active.
nda.error.expired.title: Link expired

nda.error.signed.message: This agreement has already been signed.
nda.error.voided.title: Agreement revoked
nda.error.voided.message: This agreement is no longer available for signing. Please contact the tax office or use the newest link they sent you.
nda.error.rate_limited.title: Too many attempts

nda.error.server.title: Something went wrong

nda.footerSecure: Encrypted signing session — your information is protected.
